title: SpaceX debuts on Nasdaq 100 with bullish bank recommendations
summary: Elon Musk's company begins trading on the selective index and analysts project an upside potential of up to $800 per share.

title: Semiconductor sector plummets over AI doubts and Samsung drag
summary: The SOX index nears a bear market after Samsung's drop despite its record profits, infecting the rest of the tech sector.

title: US launches attacks against Iran and revokes oil licenses, crude rises to two-week highs
summary: The escalation in the Strait of Hormuz raises oil prices and generates uncertainty about global supply.

title: Artificial intelligence shakes financial markets: stock market falls and new regulation
summary: Oracle plummets 25% over AI warnings, software falls sharply, and regulators incorporate AI into corporate governance codes.

title: McCormick, Coty and Adnoc close agreements worth billions
summary: McCormick enters the refrigerated business, Coty drops the Gucci license, and Adnoc buys Shell's subsidiary in South Africa.

title: Amazon issues $25 billion in bonds to finance its investment in artificial intelligence
summary: The company seeks external capital for large AI expenditures, moving away from internal financing.

title: Japan: 10-year bond yield reaches highest level in 30 years and Nikkei falls
summary: Japanese government debt soars on oil-related inflation fears, while the stock market and yen weaken.

title: Apple tests CXMT chips for devices in China and iPhone could rise in price due to memory costs
summary: The price of memory chips triples, which would force Apple to raise the iPhone price by 13 to 15 million yen.

title: Roadside rescue faces a future with autonomous vehicles
summary: Roadside assistance services could become obsolete with the arrival of driverless cars, according to analysts.

title: HSBC withdraws from private credit funds due to increased risks
summary: The British bank reduces its exposure to private loans amid market volatility.

title: Bank supervisors demand banks plan against cyberattacks with artificial intelligence
summary: The ECB and other bodies warn of a growing threat of AI-powered cyberattacks and call for immediate action.

title: SK Hynix recommended by UBS to invest in US as ADR
summary: The Swiss bank recommends buying ADRs of South Korean SK Hynix in the US market, generating debate among investors.

title: Consolidation prospects for Asian stock markets on Wednesday
summary: Markets in Indonesia, Hong Kong, China, Australia, Taiwan and Singapore show signs of moderation or declines.

title: Hulic acquires Tetsurinkai university prep academy, formerly owned by Benesse
summary: The Japanese real estate company buys the preparation business for the University of Tokyo amid a restructuring of the education sector.

title: IOC allows Russia to participate in Los Angeles 2028 and excludes Nordic combined from 2030 Games
summary: Restrictions on Russia are lifted for the next Olympic Games, while Nordic combined skiing is left out of the program.

title: Naomi Osaka falls in Wimbledon quarterfinals and Yui Kamiji advances in wheelchair
summary: The Japanese tennis player loses to Muchova, while Kamiji qualifies for the quarterfinals in the wheelchair category.

title: Argentina comes back and Messi scores in his ninth consecutive World Cup match, Switzerland also advances
summary: Argentina wins an exciting round of 16 match and Switzerland joins the quarterfinal qualifiers.

title: Toyota shifts production from Mexico to US after nine years, Trump celebrates
summary: Toyota's decision returns jobs to the US and is seen as a success of Trump's tariff policy.

title: IMF appoints Pierre-Olivier Gourinchas as new chief economist
summary: The former member of the Bank of England's Monetary Policy Committee takes office in a context of global economic uncertainty.

title: Japan suggests temporary return of technical interns as their visas expire
summary: The government proposes that workers in the internship program return to their home countries while the extension of their stay is reviewed.
